trans-unit.source: Assessments in GIS Training: A Guide
trans-unit.target: Assessments in GIS Training: A Guide

trans-unit.source: This article will explain the assessment survey provided on this platform that can be used to assess the success of basic GIS training. This assessment is geared towards assessing the motivation to learn GIS and the participants' self-assessment of their GIS skills. The assessment is kept short and focuses on the essentials. It is meant to be extended by trainers if they see the need.
trans-unit.target: This article will explain the assessment survey provided on this platform that can be used to assess the success of basic GIS training. This assessment is geared towards assessing the motivation to learn GIS and the participants' self-assessment of their GIS skills. The assessment is kept short and focuses on the essentials. It is meant to be extended by trainers if they see the need.

trans-unit.source: Why do we do assessments?
trans-unit.target: Why do we do assessments?

trans-unit.source: There are many reasons why assessments are an essential part of every training. In the end, we want to know how successful the training was. Assessments, before and after the training, can also provide other important information. We have listed some below:
trans-unit.target: There are many reasons why assessments are an essential part of every training. In the end, we want to know how successful the training was. Assessments, before and after the training, can also provide other important information. We have listed some below:

trans-unit.source: **Understanding baseline proficiency:** Before diving into the training content, it's essential to assess the participants' current knowledge, skills, and motivation related to GIS. This baseline measurement helps us tailor the training to meet the needs of our participants.
trans-unit.target: **Understanding baseline proficiency:** Before diving into the training content, it's essential to assess the participants' current knowledge, skills, and motivation related to GIS. This baseline measurement helps us tailor the training to meet the needs of our participants.

trans-unit.source: **Customizing training content:** By analyzing pre-training assessments, trainers can customize the training content to suit the proficiency level of each participant. This ensures that the training remains relevant and engaging for everyone, regardless of their prior experience with GIS.
trans-unit.target: **Customizing training content:** By analyzing pre-training assessments, trainers can customize the training content to suit the proficiency level of each participant. This ensures that the training remains relevant and engaging for everyone, regardless of their prior experience with GIS.

trans-unit.source: **Setting clear goals and expectations:** Assessments before the training assist in setting clear goals and expectations for both trainers and participants. By understanding the starting point of each participant, trainers can establish specific learning objectives for the training, providing a roadmap for success.
trans-unit.target: **Setting clear goals and expectations:** Assessments before the training assist in setting clear goals and expectations for both trainers and participants. By understanding the starting point of each participant, trainers can establish specific learning objectives for the training, providing a roadmap for success.

trans-unit.source: **Measuring progress and effectiveness:** Post-training assessments allow trainers to measure the progress of participants and evaluate the effectiveness of the training program. By comparing pre-training and post-training results, trainers can assess the impact of the training and identify areas for improvement.
trans-unit.target: **Measuring progress and effectiveness:** Post-training assessments allow trainers to measure the progress of participants and evaluate the effectiveness of the training program. By comparing pre-training and post-training results, trainers can assess the impact of the training and identify areas for improvement.

trans-unit.source: **Gathering feedback for improvement:** Post-training assessments provide valuable feedback for trainers. They offer insights into the participants' perceptions of the training, highlight any gaps in learning, and provide suggestions for enhancing future training programs.
trans-unit.target: **Gathering feedback for improvement:** Post-training assessments provide valuable feedback for trainers. They offer insights into the participants' perceptions of the training, highlight any gaps in learning, and provide suggestions for enhancing future training programs.

trans-unit.source: **Motivating continued learning:** Finally, assessments help reinforce learning and motivation among participants. Seeing tangible improvements in their skills and knowledge encourages participants to continue using GIS and further develop their expertise.
trans-unit.target: **Motivating continued learning:** Finally, assessments help reinforce learning and motivation among participants. Seeing tangible improvements in their skills and knowledge encourages participants to continue using GIS and further develop their expertise.

trans-unit.source: In summary, assessments play a vital role in GIS training by providing baseline measurements, customizing training content, setting clear goals, measuring progress, gathering feedback, and motivating continued learning. Incorporating assessments into your training program ensures a more effective and impactful learning experience for all participants.
trans-unit.target: In summary, assessments play a vital role in GIS training by providing baseline measurements, customizing training content, setting clear goals, measuring progress, gathering feedback, and motivating continued learning. Incorporating assessments into your training program ensures a more effective and impactful learning experience for all participants.

trans-unit.source: How to do the assessment
trans-unit.target: How to do the assessment

trans-unit.source: Based on the standard assessment survey, you have three options:
trans-unit.target: Based on the standard assessment survey, you have three options:

trans-unit.source: __Paper or Word based:__ You can utilize a paper-based version or distribute the Word file via email. This allows everyone to fill out the survey, and later, you can extract the data.
trans-unit.target: __Paper or Word based:__ You can utilize a paper-based version or distribute the Word file via email. This allows everyone to fill out the survey, and later, you can extract the data.

trans-unit.source: __Google Survey:__ Alternatively, you can use Google Surveys with the provided template. This digital approach offers the benefits of Google Surveys' functionality, and you can view the results immediately.
trans-unit.target: __Google Survey:__ Alternatively, you can use Google Surveys with the provided template. This digital approach offers the benefits of Google Surveys' functionality, and you can view the results immediately.

trans-unit.source: __Use another survey system:__ Otherwise, you have the flexibility to take the questions and incorporate them into any other survey system you prefer to use.
trans-unit.target: __Use another survey system:__ Otherwise, you have the flexibility to take the questions and incorporate them into any other survey system you prefer to use.

trans-unit.source: Below you can find a detailed explanation of each survey section and question.
trans-unit.target: Below you can find a detailed explanation of each survey section and question.

trans-unit.source: How motivated are you to learn more about QGIS? (scale 1-5)
trans-unit.target: How motivated are you to learn more about QGIS? (scale 1-5)

trans-unit.source: Why would you like to learn (more) about QGIS? (multiple answers possible)
trans-unit.target: Why would you like to learn (more) about QGIS? (multiple answers possible)

trans-unit.source: I would like to create maps for:
trans-unit.target: I would like to create maps for:

trans-unit.source: What is your current level of knowledge in QGIS? (scale 1-5)
trans-unit.target: What is your current level of knowledge in QGIS? (scale 1-5)

trans-unit.source: What is your previous experience in QGIS operations? (multiple answers possible)
trans-unit.target: What is your previous experience in QGIS operations? (multiple answers possible)

trans-unit.source: I have basic knowledge in data processing
trans-unit.target: I have basic knowledge in data processing

trans-unit.source: I have basic knowledge in geodata (e.g. vector vs. raster data)
trans-unit.target: I have basic knowledge in geodata (e.g. vector vs. raster data)

trans-unit.source: I have basic knowledge in statistics
trans-unit.target: I have basic knowledge in statistics

trans-unit.source: I use maps on a regular basis
trans-unit.target: I use maps on a regular basis

trans-unit.source: How much did you learn during the training? (scale 1-5)
trans-unit.target: How much did you learn during the training? (scale 1-5)

trans-unit.source: What competence did you acquire during the training?
trans-unit.target: What competence did you acquire during the training?

trans-unit.source: I know how to create a basic map (e.g. overview map of a country)
trans-unit.target: I know how to create a basic map (e.g. overview map of a country)

trans-unit.source: I know where I can get data for my project
trans-unit.target: I know where I can get data for my project

trans-unit.source: I know where to get information when a technical problem occurs
trans-unit.target: I know where to get information when a technical problem occurs

trans-unit.source: Did you find the training comprehensible? (scale 1-5)
trans-unit.target: Did you find the training comprehensible? (scale 1-5)

trans-unit.source: How motivated are you to work with QGIS in the future?
trans-unit.target: How motivated are you to work with QGIS in the future?

trans-unit.source: Will you use QGIS in your professional activity?
trans-unit.target: Will you use QGIS in your professional activity?

trans-unit.source: Do feel prepared for your job requirements regarding QGIS?
trans-unit.target: Do feel prepared for your job requirements regarding QGIS?

trans-unit.source: Did the training meet your expectations?
trans-unit.target: Did the training meet your expectations?

trans-unit.source: If no, what would you like to change?
trans-unit.target: If no, what would you like to change?

trans-unit.source: Would you like to continue QGIS-training? (yes, no, maybe)
trans-unit.target: Would you like to continue QGIS-training? (yes, no, maybe)

trans-unit.source: If yes, what would you like to learn?
trans-unit.target: If yes, what would you like to learn?

trans-unit.source: What did you like about the training?
trans-unit.target: What did you like about the training?

trans-unit.source: Where do you see a need for improvement?
trans-unit.target: Where do you see a need for improvement?
